input: We need to choose between building a feature in-house vs buying a SaaS solution. Our team has 3 engineers and a 6-week deadline. The build option would take 8 weeks but give us full control. The buy option costs $50K/year but ships in 1 week.
How do I assess whether a decision is reversible and how should that change my analysis approach?
My scoring matrix shows two options tied at 72 points each. How do I break the tie and make a recommendation?
I keep making decisions that seem right at the time but fail 6 months later. How do I use a decision journal to improve?
Conduct a pre-mortem on the decision to migrate our monolith to microservices with a team of 5 engineers over 12 months.
